NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IAppCastDataDownloader
public interface
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IAppCastDataDownloader
NetSparkleUnitTests.​StringCastDataDownloader
NetSparkleUpdater.​Downloaders.​LocalFileAppCastDownloader
NetSparkleUpdater.​Downloaders.​WebRequestAppCastDataDownloader

Interface used by objects that can download app casts from the internet.  Use this interface to provide a custom method of grabbing your app cast from the internet or from a local file.

Functions
DownloadAndGetAppCastData
string DownloadAndGetAppCastData(
string 
url
)

Download a string of data at the given URL.  Used for both downloading app cast and the app cast's .signature file.  Note that you must handle your own exceptions if they occur.  Otherwise, at SparkleUpdater will act as though the appcast failed to download.

Parameter
url
string

non-null string URL for the place where the app cast can be downloaded

Returns

The app cast data encoded as a string

DownloadAndGetAppCastDataAsync
Task<string> DownloadAndGetAppCastDataAsync(
string 
url
)

Async download a string of data at the given URL.  Used for both downloading app cast and the app cast's .signature file.  Note that you must handle your own exceptions if they occur.  Otherwise, at SparkleUpdater will act as though the appcast failed to download.

Parameter
url
string

non-null string URL for the place where the app cast can be downloaded

Returns

The app cast data encoded as a string

GetAppCastEncoding
Encoding GetAppCastEncoding()

Get the string encoding (e.g. UTF8 or ASCII) of the app cast file so that it can be converted to bytes.  (WebRequestAppCastDataDownloader defaults to UTF8.)

Returns

The  of the app cast
